argument: The core of the contested claim that Langfuse was accepted into Y Combinator (W23) is indeed verifiable, as evidenced by founder statements which clearly state their entry into the YC program in November 2022 [deck]. This aligns with the timeline for the W23 batch, which ran from January to March 2023, suggesting that the application and acceptance processes likely coincided. Although the prosecution asserts a lack of external verification, corroboration can be seen in the details of Langfuse's own documentation and timeline accounts [langfuse.com/handbook/chapters/story]. It is important to emphasize that while the month may not have an external source explicitly confirming it, the internal documentation provides a consistent account of their involvement with Y Combinator. We concede that the framing surrounding the November date is potentially unverified, yet it is plausible that acceptance communications may have occurred then, prior to the official batch commencement.
